text.title: Cost PR Gate Recipe Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Cost PR Gate Recipe methodology end-to-end. Each step declares input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: estimate-cost-delta
step.action: Run cost-estimate step (Infracost or equivalent) against the diff.
step.decision-gate: If estimator fails, fail-closed (block merge) until repaired.

step.name: compare-against-budget
step.decision-gate: Warn route notifies; breach route blocks.

step.name: emit-gate-decision
step.action: Compose gate decision record naming approver if breach.
